mapper.sql: log_id, job_name, trigger_type, run_time, total_count, success_count, fail_count, status, error_message, duration_ms, operator_id, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_scheduled_job_log (job_name, trigger_type, run_time, total_count, success_count, fail_count, status, error_message, duration_ms, operator_id, created_at) VALUES (#{jobName}, #{triggerType}, #{runTime}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{durationMs}, #{operatorId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_scheduled_job_log WHERE job_name = #{jobName} ORDER BY run_time DESC LIMIT 1
